---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Angira Shukla"
---

::: {.profile-header}
![](assets/headshot.jpg){.headshot fig-alt="Angira Shukla"}

::: {.intro}
# Angira Shukla

::: {.tagline}
Incoming PhD Student in Economics, University of Chicago
:::

I am an incoming Economics PhD student at the University of Chicago (starting Fall 2026). I was a predoc with Oeindrila Dube at the Becker Friedman Institute, where my work spanned development, environmental, and behavioral economics.

My research interests sit at the intersection of **development and environmental economics** — how climate and environmental change shape the lives of vulnerable populations, and how policy can address the resulting market failures. I work with primary surveys, satellite and geospatial data, and large-scale administrative datasets.

::: {.contact-links}
[✉ Email](mailto:angira.shukla@gmail.com)
[CV](cv.qmd)
[GitHub](https://github.com/angirashukla)
[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/angira-shukla/)
[Twitter/X](https://x.com/ShuklaAngira)
:::

:::
:::

## About

Before Chicago, I earned an MS in International and Development Economics from the University of San Francisco, where I received the Jacques Artus Award and the Schmidt Family Fellowship, and a BA (Honors) in Economics from Ramjas College, University of Delhi. I have worked on field experiments in Nigeria and India, and on research using satellite-derived fire and weather data across Indian states.

See my [research](research.qmd) for current and past projects, my [CV](cv.qmd) for the full record, and [photography](photography.qmd) for work from my camera.

## Photos of the Day

A rotating handful from my camera — a new set each day. See [more](photography.qmd).

<div class="potd" id="potd"></div>

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# Expose the full photo list to the browser; JS picks 5 per day (date-seeded).
imgs <- list.files(
  "photos",
  pattern = "\\.(jpg|jpeg|png|webp|JPG|JPEG|PNG|WEBP)$",
  full.names = FALSE
)
if (length(imgs) > 0) {
  arr <- paste0('"photos/', imgs, '"', collapse = ",")
  cat(sprintf('<script>const POTD_ALL=[%s];</script>\n', arr))
}
```

```{=html}
<script>
(function () {
  // Deterministic PRNG (mulberry32) so the same 5 photos show all day, per date.
  function mulberry32(a) {
    return function () {
      a |= 0; a = a + 0x6D2B79F5 | 0;
      var t = Math.imul(a ^ a >>> 15, 1 | a);
      t = t + Math.imul(t ^ t >>> 7, 61 | t) ^ t;
      return ((t ^ t >>> 14) >>> 0) / 4294967296;
    };
  }
  function render() {
    var box = document.getElementById("potd");
    if (!box || typeof POTD_ALL === "undefined" || !POTD_ALL.length) return;
    var d = new Date();
    var seed = d.getFullYear() * 10000 + (d.getMonth() + 1) * 100 + d.getDate();
    var rnd = mulberry32(seed);
    var pool = POTD_ALL.slice();
    for (var i = pool.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {      // Fisher–Yates shuffle
      var j = Math.floor(rnd() * (i + 1));
      var tmp = pool[i]; pool[i] = pool[j]; pool[j] = tmp;
    }
    box.innerHTML = "";
    pool.slice(0, Math.min(5, pool.length)).forEach(function (p) {
      var im = document.createElement("img");
      im.src = encodeURI(p); im.alt = "Photo of the day";
      im.className = "zoomable"; im.loading = "lazy";
      box.appendChild(im);
    });
  }
  if (document.readyState !== "loading") render();
  else document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", render);
})();
</script>
```
